title: cotyledon umbilicus-veneris subsp. horizontalis
intro: Cotyledon umbilicus-veneris subsp. horizontalis, also known as Venus's pride, is a subspecies of succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, calm digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cotyledon umbilicus-veneris subsp. horizontalis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its adaptogenic properties.
